title: hypericum acutum subsp. boeticum
intro: Hypericum acutum subsp. boeticum, also known as Boetikon St. John's Wort, is a subspecies of the Hypericum acutum plant, which is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hypericum acutum subsp. boeticum include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
